name: Projektmanagement Tool
description: Central cockpit for standardized AI project workflows, chats, handoffs, tests, decisions and backups.
nextAction: Create CHATGPT_PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS_TEMPLATE.md after the V1.1 cockpit is verified.
warning: Real project backups and private chat summaries require a private repository or local-only export.

goals.goal: Standardize Mika AI projects at a consistently high quality and preserve their context.
goals.problem: Project work is spread across models, chats, handoffs, branches and backups without a single cockpit.
goals.targetGroup: Mika as project owner and the AI tools working under explicit roles.
successCriteria: All projects are visible from one start screen.
Each project shows workflow phase, gates, AI chats and backup status.
Private content is never silently published.
nonGoals: No automatic GitHub writes from the static UI.
No secrets or credentials in workspace JSON.
constraints: Static GitHub Pages operation remains possible.
Private repo usage is recommended for real project data.
User input wins during import conflicts.

phases.title: Project Management Tool V1
phases.description: First static single-project version and legacy migration layer.

phases.title: Project Management Tool V1.1
phases.description: Multi-project cockpit and standardized AI workflow integration.

batches.title: Todo tool to AI project management tool V1
batches.description: Static, mobile and legacy-compatible first version.
acceptanceCriteria: Private notes and screenshots remain local.

tasks.title: Implement legacy adapter and non-destructive import

batches.title: Multi-project AI workflow cockpit V1.1
batches.description: Follow-up based on Mika review: project tiles, grouped project navigation, AI/chat hierarchy and scoped backups.
acceptanceCriteria: App starts with two project tiles.
Project and global backups are separate.

tasks.title: Replace long navigation with grouped project cockpit
Integrate AI models, chats and backup state
Add global and project-scoped backup flows
Run static and legacy migration checks

ideas.title: Private repository synchronization backend
ideas.description: Evaluate only after the static workflow and data boundaries are proven.

questions.title: When should the repository be switched to private?
questions.impact: Controls whether real chat summaries and project backups may be committed.

decisions.title: V1.1 remains static but private-repo-ready
decisions.reason: A static tool is simple to deploy and test while the workflow is still evolving.
decisions.decision: Keep local persistence and file-based backups; document private-repo limitations visibly.
decisions.impact: No automatic background synchronization or chat ingestion.

decisions.title: The app starts with a project dashboard
decisions.reason: Mika manages multiple projects and does not want the Finanztracker to own the start screen.
decisions.decision: Show project tiles first and open a project-specific cockpit after selection.
decisions.impact: Navigation and local state become project-scoped.

aiModels.name: ChatGPT
aiModels.role: Project steering, workflow design, review and handoffs

chats.name: Masterchat
chats.purpose: Own the workflow design, decisions and implementation handoffs
chats.scope: Own the workflow design, decisions and implementation handoffs
chats.currentSummary: V1 review requires a multi-project cockpit and a standardized AI workflow model.
chats.nextAction: Create or link a current backup after meaningful work.

chats.name: V1 Visual Review
chats.purpose: Capture Mika review and define V1.1 acceptance
chats.scope: Capture Mika review and define V1.1 acceptance
chats.currentSummary: Multi-project start, grouped navigation and AI/chat hierarchy were requested.
chats.nextAction: Create or link a current backup after meaningful work.

chats.name: V1.1 Follow-up implementation
chats.purpose: Implement the reviewed V1.1 on the dedicated follow-up branch
chats.scope: Implement the reviewed V1.1 on the dedicated follow-up branch
chats.currentSummary: Branch prepared with a complete follow-up handoff.
chats.nextAction: Run static and migration checks, then report without opening a PR.

files.name: PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_TOOL_V1_FOLLOWUP_HANDOFF.md
files.purpose: Binding V1.1 requirements and verification plan

repositories.name: MikaMcFlurry/todos
repositories.warning: Do not merge the V1.1 branch before manual mobile and backup verification.

timeline.title: Static V1 implemented
timeline.description: Single-project cockpit with legacy import and local private state.

timeline.title: Mika rejected V1 for merge
timeline.description: The start screen, navigation and workflow model require a V1.1 follow-up.

timeline.title: V1.1 follow-up handoff committed
timeline.description: The follow-up branch contains the binding implementation handoff.

risks.title: Real project content in a public repository
risks.impact: Private chat summaries, decisions or backups could be exposed.
risks.mitigation: Commit only sanitized metadata; use private repo or local exports for real content.

risks.title: Static app cannot ingest chats automatically
risks.impact: Backup status depends on manual or ChatGPT-assisted updates.
risks.mitigation: Show explicit reminder states and never claim automatic ingestion.
